title: swida occidentalis
intro: Swida occidentalis, also known as American Alder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Swida occidentalis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, as well as being used as a natural remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Swida occidentalis include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to make teas, capsules, and topical applications for various health benefits.
